web.billing.currency_migration.title.context: Modal title when plan requires different currency than current subscription

web.billing.currency_migration.descripti.text: Your current subscription uses {from}. The selected plan is billed in {to}. This requires migrating your subscription to the new currency.

web.billing.currency_migration.graceful_.text: Switch at end of billing period
Your current plan stays active until {date}. After that, you'll complete checkout for your new plan.

web.billing.currency_migration.immediate.text: Your current plan is cancelled now. You'll receive a refund for your unused time and complete checkout for the new plan.

web.billing.currency_migration.error.text: Currency migration failed. Please try again.

web.billing.currency_migration.success.text: Your subscription currency has been updated successfully.

web.billing.currency_migration.graceful_.text: Your current plan will remain active until the end of the billing period. You'll be prompted to complete checkout for your new plan after that.

web.billing.currency_migration.warning_c.text: You have a credit balance in {currency} that cannot be transferred to the new currency.

web.billing.currency_migration.warning_p.text: You have pending invoice items that will need to be resolved before migration.

web.billing.currency_migration.warning_c.text: Active coupons on your account may not be compatible with the new currency.

web.billing.currency_migration.pending_t.context: Banner heading when graceful migration is scheduled

web.billing.currency_migration.pending_d.text: Your current plan ends on {date}. Complete your switch to {plan} ({currency}).

web.billing.currency_migration.complete_.context: Button to start checkout for the new currency plan

web.billing.checkout_session_failed.context: Error when Stripe checkout session creation returns no URL
